# TZ: Asia/Taipei
# Jobs: ext_to_int_threat_unblocked, int_to_ext_flow_ioc, trojan_irc_top, cert_remote_top, dns_ptr_anomaly, ext_to_int_ssh_inflow
# Note: main src = daily_topn_src(00:00~now) UNION incremental_union
# Rules: public IPv4 only; exclude_cidrs=140.122.0.0/16; allowlist_ips=1.0.0.1,1.1.1.1,149.112.112.112,208.67.220.220,208.67.222.222,8.8.4.4,8.8.8.8,9.9.9.9; allowlist_cidrs=(none)
